headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.googleapis.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://*.emailjs.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://res.cloudinary.com https://*.unsplash.com https://*.firebasestorage.app https://*.googleusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com https://api.cloudinary.com https://*.emailjs.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.firebasestorage.app; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
